---
pagetitle: "Other"
---

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fontawesome)
```

# Music

<div align="justify">

#### `r fa("music")` A few songs I am into recently

* *Ti odio e ti amo (come Milano)*, (*<a href="https://open.spotify.com/intl-it/track/1O7mY0f08VEsAjH9Zgx5pR?si=fe53a569baeb43da" target="_blank">**listen!**</a>*)

* *An Evening I Will Not Forget*, (*<a href="https://open.spotify.com/intl-it/track/1yLSv3RVh0BzTnaGlTapsP?si=21bda830b7144223" target="_blank">**listen!**</a>*)

* *Live Forever*, (*<a href="https://open.spotify.com/intl-it/track/6TlQ5fbojNRuG0hPQMbxeW?si=adcf713813bc4be1" target="_blank">**listen!**</a>*)

* New Dermot Kennedy's album, *The Weight of the Woods*, is out! (*<a href="https://open.spotify.com/intl-it/album/75pxFt8fBxAZaSII4Ur6Dd" target="_blank">**listen!**</a>*) 

Check my Spotify (to be updated) *<a href="https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6qYpvSPGedMFXl6rZiqxiK?si=ced1e59686d54d84" target="_blank">**playlist!**</a>*

<br />
